_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from GMM sources — unanalysed

items.title: Global bond rout pushes US yields +50bps, UK +70bps, Italy +80bps
items.summary: Yields surged amid market repricing from rate cuts to hikes. Relevant as it signals shift in global rate expectations.
items.domain_relevance: Sovereign stress and central bank policy shift

items.title: Markets price 12% odds of Fed April hike, >30% by October
items.summary: Rate expectations flipped due to geopolitical supply shock inflating expectations. Indicates regime shift in monetary policy.
items.domain_relevance: Central bank decisions and inflation repricing

items.title: Eurozone Composite PMI falls to 50.5, new orders contract
items.summary: Business activity softened in March with supply chain disruptions. Signals weakening Eurozone growth amid inflation pressures.
items.domain_relevance: Weak growth and ECB policy dilemma

items.title: OECD cuts Eurozone 2026 growth to 0.8% from 1.2%
items.summary: Forecast downgrade due to Middle East conflict raising costs and curbing demand. UK forecast cut to 0.7%.
items.domain_relevance: Global growth forecasts and geopolitical impact

items.title: Japan 10Y JGB yield rises to 2.34% on inflation expectations
items.summary: Yield up from 2.26% tracking global trends, weaker yen, oil prices. BoJ left rates unchanged but open to April hike.
items.domain_relevance: BoJ policy normalization and yen stress

items.title: Banxico signals easing cycle nearing end, rates ~6.5%
items.summary: Revised inflation higher but expects target by 2027; weak growth noted, may assess one more cut.

items.title: US 10Y Treasury yields toward 4.4% as inflation reprices higher
items.summary: Shift from multiple cuts to tightening probability amid geopolitical shocks. Rate-sensitive sectors underperform.
items.domain_relevance: US credit markets and Fed expectations

items.title: ECB trapped between weak growth and services inflation
items.summary: Signaling potential hikes despite demand weakness; markets watch for cut timing.

items.title: BoJ monitors yen for intervention amid weakening
items.summary: Rising JGB yields suggest policy normalization; currency weakness in focus.

items.title: Conference Board 3Ds rule signals US recession risk
items.summary: Six-month diffusion <=50 and LEI growth <-4.3% indicate imminent downturn.
items.domain_relevance: US sovereign stress and macro indicators
